LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, CALENDAR OF JAN-26-1994, DENIED PER CCP 2030(L). ATTORNEY FEES - DENIED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLT. AND DEFT. RECOVER NOTHING FROM EA. OTHER. PLT. AND DEFT. BEAR THEIR OWN COST AND ATTORNEY'S FEES. THIS IS A FULL AND FINAL SETTLEMENT AND MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS, RIGHTS,OBLIGATIONS, AND DAMAGES AS TO ANY MATTER WHATSOEVER BETWEEN PLT. AND DEFT. EXCEPT FOR PLT.'S CLAIM IN DEFT'S BANKRUPTCY ACTION 	1-3-3028 KTC, WHICH CLAIM REMAINS UNAFFECTED BY THIS JUDGMENT. PLT. AND DEFT. ARE PERMANENTLY PROHIBITED AND ENJOINED FROM BOTHERING, ANNOYING,HARASSING, CONTACTING, AND TELEPHONING EA. OTHER IN ANY MANNER WHATSOEVER EITHER IN PERSON, BY MAIL OR THROUGH ANOTHER PERSON, AND ARE FURTHER ORDERED TO STAY AT LEAST 100 YARDS FROM THE OTHER'S HOME OR PLACE OF EMPLOYEMENT. DEFT. JERRY KU IS PROHIBITED AND ENJOINED FROM CONTACTING, VISITING, TELEPHONING, OR ANNOYING PLT'S WIFE, AI-JUN CHEN PENG EITHER PERSONALLY BY MAIL OR THROUGH ANOTHER PERSON, AND IS FURTHER ORDERED TO STAY AT LEAST 100 YARDS AWAY FROM AI JUN PENG'S RESIDENCE AND PLACE OF WORK.
